name: Title Language Detection
description: Detects the language of titles and suggests the code to save.

status_labels.completed_with_results: Language detection completed: {count} new suggestion(s) found.
status_labels.completed_empty: Language detection completed: No new suggestions found.
status_labels.already_running: A language detection job is already running.

empty_state.title: No pending title language suggestions
empty_state.description: All titles already have a language code or no suggestions were found.
